$comment: TIN-2423 / ledger item 30: named-interface allowlist for the substrate-boundary validator. Every entry carries provenance (TIN-2398 guardrail #2). A blahaj-reach hit under an allowlisted path_prefix is a NAMED INTERFACE, not a bleed.

allowed.interface: design-rationale comment only, no actual reach: this Worker's failure alerting POSTs exclusively to env.NTFY_TOPIC_URL (a public ntfy.sh topic); the comment explains that ntfy is used because it is the only internet-reachable seam of the ClusterIP-only tinyland Alertmanager (which lives in blahaj's cluster) — a decoupled pub/sub relationship, not a direct dependency on the blahaj repo, filesystem, or state

provenance.decision: TIN-2148 (cited in-line as the long-term path for a full Alertmanager POST /api/v2/alerts integration); current state is ntfy-only pub/sub, verified by reading the fetch() call sites (only env.NTFY_TOPIC_URL / env.HEALTHCHECK_URL are ever POSTed to)
